chapter_title.en: Chapter 123 – The Tawaaf and touching the corners

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/22)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/22)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا أَقُولُ إِذَا اسْتَقْبَلْتُ الْحَجَرَ فَقَالَ كَبِّرْ وَ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ
‘كَبِّرْ وَ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ’
قَالَ وَ سَمِعْتُهُ إِذَا أَتَى الْحَجَرَ يَقُولُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ السَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .
‘اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ السَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله)’

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin yahya, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What should I be saying when I face the Black Stone?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said:
‘Exclaim the Greatness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> (Takbeer), and send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> Progeny<sup>asws</sup> (Salawaat)’.
He (the narrator) said, ‘And I heard him<sup>asws</sup> when he<sup>asws</sup> went over to the (Black) Stone, he<sup>asws</sup> was saying:
‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the Greatest! The greetings be upon Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb who has said the following: “I once asked Abu `Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, £ What should I say when I face the Black Stone?’ He (the Imam) replied, £ Say Takhir (Allah is great beyond description) and say O Allah, grant salawat (favors and compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause).’ I also heard him when going near the Black Stone say Takhir (Allah is great beyond description) and say, ’Peace and obedience is due for the Messenger of Allah.’”
